function.name: list_files
function.description: List files and directories in a specific path within the project sandbox.

directory_path.description: The relative path to the directory to list (e.g., '.', 'src/', or 'docs/').

function.name: read_file_content
function.description: Read the text content of a specific file within the project sandbox.

file_path.description: The relative path to the file to read (e.g., 'README.md' or 'src/main.py').

function.name: query_api
function.description: Query the deployed backend API to get live data or test endpoints. Use this for questions about item counts, HTTP status codes, analytics data, or to reproduce API errors. Returns status_code and response body.

method.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.)

body.description: JSON request body for POST/PUT requests (optional)
